name: Tailscale
description: Tunnel plugin — local Tailscale serve/funnel or Eliza Cloud-routed Tailscale auth-key minter. Mutually exclusive with the ngrok tunnel plugin.

TAILSCALE_BACKEND.label: Backend
TAILSCALE_BACKEND.help: Backend to use: 'local' (tailscale CLI), 'cloud' (Eliza Cloud-minted ephemeral auth key), or 'auto' (cloud when Eliza Cloud is connected, else local).

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.label: Auth Key
TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.help: Optional pre-minted Tailscale auth key for the local backend. Most users authenticate once via 'tailscale up' and never set this.

TAILSCALE_TAGS.label: Tags
TAILSCALE_TAGS.help: Comma-separated ACL tags applied to the cloud-minted ephemeral key.

TAILSCALE_FUNNEL.label: Use Funnel
TAILSCALE_FUNNEL.help: When true, use 'tailscale funnel' to expose to the public Internet. When false, use 'tailscale serve' (tailnet-internal only).

TAILSCALE_DEFAULT_PORT.label: Default Port
TAILSCALE_DEFAULT_PORT.help: Used when no port is extracted from the user message.

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS.label: Auth Key Expiry (seconds)
TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS.help: Expiry hint passed to the cloud auth-key minter.
